author: GameSpot YouTube
text:
Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 Preview
We went hands-on with Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4's multiplayer to see how Infinity Ward is tuning up movement and gunplay in this year's Call of Duty offering.

After two years of Black Ops games, Infinity Ward returns to the helm for this year's entry into the Call of Duty franchise. With Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4, the developer says it's entering a new chapter--both for the series that helped catapult Call of Duty into its status as a household name, and for the studio at large.

For Modern Warfare 4, that new chapter helps redefine where the series is headed. Since 2019, the Modern Warfare series has rebooted the original Modern Warfare trilogy, which first kicked off in 2007, and its campaigns have worked somewhat within the framework of those original three games. In terms of its campaign and story, Modern Warfare 4 is the first title in the modern series to step off into wholly new territory

#cod #mw #gaming #modernwarfare4 #callofduty #gamespot
